Experience

Lead Studio Director — TV, Film & Digital Media Program 2025–2026
  • Promoted to lead director overseeing broadcast-quality productions and the full digital media curriculum

CTE Program Revamp — Lead — Career Technical Education Summer 2026
  • Entrusted with roughly $100,000 budget to overhaul and relaunch a CTE program from the ground up
  • Responsible for curriculum design, equipment procurement, and brand identity
Self-Directed Investor — Personal 2019–present
  • Built and managed a personal investment account from age ten — real capital, real decisions
  • Self-taught through primary sources: financial statements, earnings calls, fund letters
  • Focus on fundamental analysis, long-term compounding, and understanding how value is created
